urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Row escalates in Ukraine over army chief's future
latest.summary: Protesters in Ukraine have threatened nationwide demonstrations if Mykhailo Fedorov is not reinstated as defence minister. Thousands in Kyiv and other cities have taken to the streets to protest against Fedorov's removal.
latest.details: Protesters in Ukraine have threatened nationwide demonstrations if Mykhailo Fedorov is not reinstated as defence minister. Thousands in Kyiv and other cities have taken to the streets to protest against Fedorov's removal. Army veteran Dmytro Koziatynskyi stated that if Oleksandr Syrskyi is not dismissed by Friday, they will begin an open-ended nationwide protest. The general staff was forced to deny reports that Gen Syrskyi was about to be sacked.
latest.full_brief: Protesters in Ukraine have threatened nationwide demonstrations if Mykhailo Fedorov is not reinstated as defence minister. Thousands in Kyiv and other cities have taken to the streets to protest against Fedorov's removal. Army veteran Dmytro Koziatynskyi stated that if Oleksandr Syrskyi is not dismissed by Friday, they will begin an open-ended nationwide protest. The general staff was forced to deny reports that Gen Syrskyi was about to be sacked.

latest.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
latest.summary: The 10th consecutive night of strikes by the US followed President Trump's vow to punish Iran for the deaths of US soldiers. Iran responded by claiming to have struck two oil tankers and US military assets in the region.
latest.details: The 10th consecutive night of strikes by the US followed President Trump's vow to punish Iran for the deaths of US soldiers. Iran responded by claiming to have struck two oil tankers and US military assets in the region. US Central Command reported that the strikes targeted Iranian military command centers and missile launch sites. Despite the tensions, commercial vessels were still reported to be passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
latest.full_brief: The 10th consecutive night of strikes by the US followed President Trump's vow to punish Iran for the deaths of US soldiers. Iran responded by claiming to have struck two oil tankers and US military assets in the region. US Central Command reported that the strikes targeted Iranian military command centers and missile launch sites. Despite the tensions, commercial vessels were still reported to be passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

latest.title: The Queensland government promised to put victims first. Instead it buried a report from…
latest.summary: The Queensland government has faced criticism for not releasing a report from a working group of domestic violence victim-survivors. This report was critical of police responses to family violence and called for a civilian review mechanism.
latest.details: The Queensland government has faced criticism for not releasing a report from a working group of domestic violence victim-survivors. This report was critical of police responses to family violence and called for a civilian review mechanism. The working group was convened in early 2025 to identify gaps in the system and guide reforms. Despite the government's promise to prioritize victims, the report's findings have not been made public.
latest.full_brief: The Queensland government has faced criticism for not releasing a report from a working group of domestic violence victim-survivors. This report was critical of police responses to family violence and called for a civilian review mechanism. The working group was convened in early 2025 to identify gaps in the system and guide reforms. Despite the government's promise to prioritize victims, the report's findings have not been made public.

latest.title: Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
latest.summary: Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash, a new security model designed to quickly find and patch vulnerabilities. This model is described as a cost-efficient alternative to larger AI systems like Anthropic's Mythos.
latest.details: Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash, a new security model designed to quickly find and patch vulnerabilities. This model is described as a cost-efficient alternative to larger AI systems like Anthropic's Mythos. Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, built on the same technology, will be available first to governments and trusted partners. Google claims that 3.5 Flash Cyber has achieved competitive performance compared to larger models in identifying security issues.
latest.full_brief: Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash, a new security model designed to quickly find and patch vulnerabilities. This model is described as a cost-efficient alternative to larger AI systems like Anthropic's Mythos. Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber, built on the same technology, will be available first to governments and trusted partners. Google claims that 3.5 Flash Cyber has achieved competitive performance compared to larger models in identifying security issues.

latest.title: Watch Texas police officer pull man from burning car
latest.summary: A Texas police officer rescued a man from a burning car during a traffic stop near Dallas. Corporal Joshua Swisher noticed smoke coming from a nearby vehicle and directed it to the emergency lane.
latest.details: A Texas police officer rescued a man from a burning car during a traffic stop near Dallas. Corporal Joshua Swisher noticed smoke coming from a nearby vehicle and directed it to the emergency lane. Shortly after, flames erupted from the car while the driver was still inside. Bodycam footage captured the dramatic rescue, which occurred on June 7.
latest.full_brief: A Texas police officer rescued a man from a burning car during a traffic stop near Dallas. Corporal Joshua Swisher noticed smoke coming from a nearby vehicle and directed it to the emergency lane. Shortly after, flames erupted from the car while the driver was still inside. Bodycam footage captured the dramatic rescue, which occurred on June 7.

latest.title: We received no alert, say leaders of First Nations communities razed by Canadian wildfires
latest.summary: Fast-moving wildfires have burned two First Nations communities in Canada to the ground. Thirteen communities in Ontario province have been ordered to evacuate because of wildfires.
latest.details: Fast-moving wildfires have burned two First Nations communities in Canada to the ground. Thirteen communities in Ontario province have been ordered to evacuate because of wildfires. The Ontario premier, Doug Ford, stated that close to 2,000 people had been evacuated to cities including Toronto and Niagara Falls. The prime minister, Mark Carney, described the situation as one of the most intense wildfire seasons in Canadian history.
latest.full_brief: Fast-moving wildfires have burned two First Nations communities in Canada to the ground. Thirteen communities in Ontario province have been ordered to evacuate because of wildfires. The Ontario premier, Doug Ford, stated that close to 2,000 people had been evacuated to cities including Toronto and Niagara Falls. The prime minister, Mark Carney, described the situation as one of the most intense wildfire seasons in Canadian history.

latest.title: US-India Satellite Delivers Data, Reveals ‘Hummingbird’ in Antarctica
latest.summary: The NISAR satellite, a collaboration between NASA and ISRO, has made its data publicly accessible as of July 20. The satellite's radar instruments help track Earth's land and ice movements and monitor ecosystem changes.
latest.details: The NISAR satellite, a collaboration between NASA and ISRO, has made its data publicly accessible as of July 20. The satellite's radar instruments help track Earth's land and ice movements and monitor ecosystem changes. An early image captured by NISAR revealed a geographical feature in Antarctica resembling a hummingbird. The image showcases the intricate details of the Antarctic landscape and the capabilities of the satellite's radar technology.
latest.full_brief: The NISAR satellite, a collaboration between NASA and ISRO, has made its data publicly accessible as of July 20. The satellite's radar instruments help track Earth's land and ice movements and monitor ecosystem changes. An early image captured by NISAR revealed a geographical feature in Antarctica resembling a hummingbird. The image showcases the intricate details of the Antarctic landscape and the capabilities of the satellite's radar technology.

latest.title: NASA Langley Celebrates Community through Music with ‘Symphony Under the Stars’ Event
latest.summary: NASA Langley hosted the 'Stars, Stripes, and Supernovas – Symphony Under the Stars' event on July 16. The event celebrated the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States and featured performances from an orchestra including NASA employees.
latest.details: NASA Langley hosted the 'Stars, Stripes, and Supernovas – Symphony Under the Stars' event on July 16. The event celebrated the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States and featured performances from an orchestra including NASA employees. The orchestra played patriotic favorites and space-inspired pieces, highlighting community talent. Organizers emphasized the collaborative effort that made the event a success.
latest.full_brief: NASA Langley hosted the 'Stars, Stripes, and Supernovas – Symphony Under the Stars' event on July 16. The event celebrated the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States and featured performances from an orchestra including NASA employees. The orchestra played patriotic favorites and space-inspired pieces, highlighting community talent. Organizers emphasized the collaborative effort that made the event a success.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
